source_pr.title: *: fix data race in join.
source_pr.body:
After pr #2605 , we can't find data race in join. Indeed there exists some races.

1. MVMap's Get is not thread safe.
2. BigFilter and OtherFilter in join context should be copied. this is caused by #3139

symptoms: *: fix data race in join. | result = tk.MustQuery("select a.c1 from t a , t1 b where a.c1 = b.c1 and a.c1 + b.c1 > 5 order by b.c1") (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: *: fix data race in join. | result = tk.MustQuery("select a.c1 from t a , t1 b where a.c1 = b.c1 and a.c1 + b.c1 > 5 order by b.c1") (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The flaky/racy behavior was caused by concurrent access to shared mutable state in join execution: MVMap's hash function used a shared hash instance without synchronization, and join filter expressions were shared across concurrent workers. This PR fixes it by introducing cloneable CNF expression lists and cloning filters per worker, and by adding a mutex to protect MVMap hash computation.
fix_pattern: Clone per-goroutine mutable structures (e.g., filter expressions) and synchronize shared state (e.g., lock around shared hash) to eliminate data races.

evidence: evidence: *: fix data race in join. | result = tk.MustQuery("select a.c1 from t a , t1 b where a.c1 = b.c1 and a.c1 + b.c1 > 5 order by b.c1") (executor/join_test.go)
files: executor/builder.go, executor/join.go, executor/join_test.go, expression/expression.go, util/mvmap/mvmap.go, util/mvmap/fnv.go, util/mvmap/mvmap_test.go
